name: M:GTA.World.ShootBullet(GTA.Math.Vector3,GTA.Math.Vector3,GTA.Ped,GTA.WeaponAsset,System.Int32,System.Single)
summary: Fires a single bullet in the world

params.name: sourcePosition
params.description: Where the bullet is fired from.

params.name: targetPosition
params.description: Where the bullet is fired to.

params.name: weaponAsset
params.description: The weapon that the bullet is fired from.

params.name: damage
params.description: The damage the bullet will cause.

params.name: speed
params.description: The speed, only affects projectile weapons, leave -1 for default.
